description:
## About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our growing data platform team. You will design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines that power our analytics and machine learning initiatives.

## Key Responsibilities

- Design and implement scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using Apache Spark and Airflow
- Build and optimize data models for our data warehouse (PostgreSQL, Redshift)
- Collaborate with data scientists and analysts to deliver reliable data products
- Implement data quality monitoring and alerting
- Mentor junior engineers and contribute to architectural decisions

## Requirements

- 5+ years of data engineering experience
- Strong proficiency in Python and SQL
- Experience with Apache Spark, Airflow, or similar frameworks
- Hands-on experience with AWS data services (Redshift, S3, Glue, EMR)
- Knowledge of data modeling and warehouse design patterns

## Benefits

- Competitive salary and equity
- Comprehensive health insurance
- Flexible work arrangements
- Learning & development budget

description:
## Frontend Developer (React)

Globex Industries is seeking a talented Frontend Developer to build exceptional user experiences with React and TypeScript.

## What You'll Do

- Build and maintain responsive web applications using React 19 and Next.js
- Write clean, type-safe code with TypeScript
- Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect UIs using Tailwind CSS
- Integrate with GraphQL APIs and manage client state
- Write unit and integration tests
- Participate in code reviews and technical discussions

## Requirements

- 3+ years of professional React development
- Strong TypeScript skills
- Experience with Next.js and server-side rendering
- Familiarity with modern CSS (Tailwind, CSS Modules)
- Experience with GraphQL clients (Apollo, urql)

## Nice to Have

- Experience with design systems
- Knowledge of accessibility standards (WCAG)
- Contributions to open-source projects

description:
## DevOps Engineer

Join Initech Solutions as a DevOps Engineer and help us scale our cloud infrastructure to support millions of users.

## Responsibilities

- Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions
- Manage Kubernetes clusters on AWS (EKS)
- Implement Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
- Monitor system health and respond to incidents
- Optimize cloud costs and resource utilization
- Automate repetitive operational tasks

## Requirements

- 4+ years of DevOps/SRE experience
- Deep knowledge of Kubernetes and container orchestration
- Experience with Terraform or Pulumi
- Strong AWS experience (EKS, EC2, RDS, S3, IAM)
- Proficiency in scripting (Bash, Python)
- Experience with monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog)

description:
## Backend Engineer — .NET

Contoso Ltd is hiring a Backend Engineer to work on our core platform built with .NET and Azure.

## What You'll Do

- Design and implement RESTful APIs using ASP.NET Core
- Work with PostgreSQL and Entity Framework Core
- Build event-driven microservices using RabbitMQ
- Deploy and monitor services on Azure (App Service, AKS)
- Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
- Collaborate with frontend and mobile teams

## Requirements

- 3+ years of .NET / C# experience
- Experience with ASP.NET Core Web API
- Solid understanding of relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred)
- Knowledge of message brokers (RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus)
- Familiarity with Docker and container orchestration

## We Offer

- Competitive salary + pension
- 25 days annual leave + bank holidays
- Hybrid working (3 days office / 2 days remote)
- Private healthcare
- Annual learning budget of £2,000

description:
## Machine Learning Engineer

NeuraTech AI is looking for an experienced ML Engineer to build and deploy production machine learning systems.

## Responsibilities

- Design and train ML models for NLP and computer vision tasks
- Build end-to-end ML pipelines from data ingestion to model serving
- Optimize model performance and inference latency
- Deploy models to production using Kubernetes and SageMaker
- Collaborate with research scientists to productionize novel algorithms
- Establish MLOps best practices (experiment tracking, model registry, A/B testing)

## Requirements

- MS or PhD in Computer Science, ML, or related field
- 4+ years of industry ML engineering experience
- Strong Python skills with PyTorch or TensorFlow
- Experience deploying models at scale (Kubernetes, AWS SageMaker)
- Solid understanding of ML fundamentals (optimization, regularization, evaluation)
- Experience with data processing at scale (Spark, Ray)

## Benefits

- Top-of-market compensation
- Fully remote with quarterly team offsites
- Unlimited PTO
- $5,000 annual learning stipend
- Latest hardware (M-series Mac or GPU workstation)

description:
## Staff Platform Engineer

Acme Corp is seeking a Staff Platform Engineer to lead the design and evolution of our internal developer platform.

## What You'll Do

- Architect and build our internal developer platform (Kubernetes-based)
- Define platform APIs, abstractions, and golden paths for product engineering teams
- Drive adoption of platform services through documentation, tooling, and enablement
- Lead technical design reviews and mentor senior engineers
- Own reliability, scalability, and cost efficiency of shared infrastructure
- Collaborate with Security to embed guardrails into the platform

## Requirements

- 8+ years of software engineering experience, with 3+ in platform/infrastructure roles
- Expert-level Kubernetes knowledge (operators, CRDs, networking, storage)
- Strong Go or Rust programming skills
- Deep experience with IaC (Terraform, Crossplane, or Pulumi)
- Track record of leading cross-team technical initiatives

## Compensation

- Base: $190K–$250K
- Equity: significant RSU grant
- Annual performance bonus

description:
## Security Engineer

Join our security team at Initech Solutions to protect our cloud infrastructure and customer data.

## Responsibilities

- Conduct security assessments and penetration testing of cloud infrastructure
- Implement and maintain security tooling (SIEM, IDS, vulnerability scanners)
- Develop security automation and incident response playbooks
- Review infrastructure-as-code for security best practices
- Collaborate with DevOps to embed security into CI/CD pipelines
- Lead security incident investigations and post-mortems

## Requirements

- 5+ years of security engineering experience
- Deep AWS security knowledge (IAM, GuardDuty, Security Hub, KMS)
- Experience with Terraform security scanning (tfsec, Checkov)
- Proficiency in Python or Go for security tooling
- Knowledge of OWASP Top 10 and common attack vectors
- Relevant certifications (AWS Security Specialty, OSCP, CEH) are a plus

- Advanced SQL skills

- Strong communication skills

## Contract Details

- Rate: $60–$80/hr depending on experience
- On-site in New York (no remote option)

description:
We are Unicode & Co. <GmbH>, a fully remote engineering team building developer tools.

About the role:
- You will own the full product surface: from pixel-perfect UI to database schema
- Our stack: React 19, Node.js 22, TypeScript (strict), PostgreSQL 16, Redis 7

Requirements:
• 3+ years with React (hooks, concurrent mode, Suspense)
• Strong TypeScript: generics, conditional types, template literal types
• PostgreSQL: window functions, CTEs, explain analyze
• Familiarity with event-driven architectures & message queues

What we offer:
€70,000–€95,000 base + equity (0.1–0.5%)
28 days PTO + local public holidays
Home office stipend: €1,500/year
Conferences & learning budget: €2,000/year

Interview process:
1. 30-min intro call
2. Take-home assignment (~4 hrs)
3. Technical deep-dive (90 min)
4. Offer

Apply via https://unicodeandco.de/apply?role=fullstack or email careers@unicodeandco.de with subject "FS-2026". 🎉
